name: environment_recall_notice_arrives_cedar_lib_eq
premise: A pipeline pressure anomaly coincided with a landowner’s unauthorized valve work; liability is unclear and the line remains pressurized. In Environment, the situation tagged internally around environment recall notice arrives cedar lib eq has converged with local pressure in the Kestrel Ridge corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Counsel insists any public statement match what is already provable from retained logs, not what leadership believes is true. Key facts are still arriving from the field; the team is working off stale dashboards and verbal handoffs. Shift change is imminent; handoff cannot proceed without a signed disposition because liability follows the signatory line. Framing has already hardened externally as liberty against equality; internal nuance will not survive the first news cycle unless it is extremely careful.

agents.name: Keisha Diallo
agents.identity: I am Keisha Diallo, the senior manager who must reconcile legal, ops, and customer-facing reality in one decision in Environment. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat equality as disposable collateral every time liberty spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Talia Patel
agents.identity: I am Talia Patel, the advocate representing the population most likely to lose if shortcuts normalize in Environment. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so liberty cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes equality in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will impose a narrow, time-boxed intervention with human override, subgroup checks, and a hard stop if harm rises—accepting slower relief to protect equality.
I will authorize a broad immediate action to stabilize outcomes now, with post-hoc measurement and correction—accepting elevated risk to equality to secure liberty before the window closes.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Silence will be interpreted as a decision by everyone outside this room. Keisha Diallo must choose under liberty versus equality. What does Keisha Diallo do?
